score.description: Overall score for an evaluation on a numeric scale.

min.description: Minimum value of the scale, e.g. 0 or 1.

max.description: Maximum value of the scale, e.g. 5 or 10.

value.description: Score within the inclusive range [min, max].

main.description: An evaluation of a hypercert record (e.g. an activity and its impact).

subjects.description: A reference to the evaluated subject(s)—this may be an activity claim, outcome claim, measurement, annotation, or even another evaluation. Multiple claims can be evaluated together.

evaluationFocus.description: The aspect/dimension being evaluated, e.g. activityValidity, evidenceQuality, contributionAssessment, or fundingWorthiness.

attachments.description: Evaluation data containing detailed reports, data, or methodology, that have been used as inputs for the evaluation.

measurements.description: Optional references to the measurements that contributed to this evaluation. The record(s) referenced must conform with the lexicon org.hypercerts.claim.measurement

summary.description: A brief, human-readable summary of the evaluation and its main conclusions.

score.description: Optional overall score for this evaluation on a numeric scale.

location.description: An optional reference for georeferenced evaluations. The record referenced must conform with the lexicon app.certified.location.

locations.description: Optional geographic references related to this evaluation. Each referenced record must conform with the app.certified.location lexicon.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created
